name: Aura Biosciences, Inc.
business: We are a clinical-stage biotechnology company developing precision therapies to treat solid tumors designed to preserve organ function. Our lead candidate bel-sar is in late-stage clinical development for the treatment of patients with early choroidal melanoma and is also in clinical development for other ocular oncology indications and bladder cancer.
sellsTo: patients with metastases to the choroid

exposures.sentence: Our lead candidate bel-sar is in late-stage clinical development for the treatment of patients with early choroidal melanoma and is also in clinical development for other ocular oncology indications and bladder cancer.

tamClaims.claim: Bladder cancer has a prevalence of approximately 80,000 cases per year in the United States.
tamClaims.sentence: Bladder cancer is the ninth most common cancer worldwide and the majority of cases are diagnosed early as non-muscle invasive bladder cancer, or NMIBC, with a prevalence of approximately 80,000 cases per year in the United States.
